name: Web Context Loader
description: A deterministic web evidence reader that turns search results and saved source artifacts into an auditable context_package with source refs, budget metadata, and warnings.

inputSchema.name: Query
inputSchema.description: Search query that produced the web evidence.

inputSchema.name: Source URLs
inputSchema.description: Source URL list returned by web_search.

inputSchema.name: Artifact Paths
inputSchema.description: Saved readable source documents returned by web_search.

inputSchema.name: Search Results
inputSchema.description: Optional raw or normalized web result objects.

inputSchema.name: Errors
inputSchema.description: Optional search or fetch errors to report as warnings.

inputSchema.name: Source Run ID
inputSchema.description: Optional graph run id associated with the web evidence.

outputSchema.name: Web Context Report
outputSchema.description: Web source refs, budget, and warnings.
